item.title: Time for another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
practical
absolutely
made me what I am today
glad i don't have an apple watch
i'm having trouble with the first part of that sentence
crazy how far custom character creation has evolved
the good stuff
mmm hmm
it's certainly not the best
yours, someone else's (with consent).... just touch one
sorry gang
matt damon
we're on to you, Frank
i will take any chance to post Command & Conquer content
lip syncing is easy. i would make them sing
glory days
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Images of Note: Nobody is in danger

ngl would buy
There is a piece of tram track just like this near me.
Trans rights motherfuckers
Ah yes, Trainman, Mr Peg, Wifebeater and Yogic Flying.
MODS, MAKE THIS MAN BEG FOR DEATH EVERYDAY AND HAVE DEATH SHIT IN THEIR FACE
Left to right: Confirmed kill count, Breeding Kink, Regina George, Serial Killer, Best girl, Ex Drama.
Left to Right: Programming Socks, Dragonball z, Nerd, Knock off Fabio, Your high school bully, "Don't cry for me, I'm already dead".
I am worried about the hand.
This one fucking sentence.
(Kaufmo)
The fact that Republicans openly support and keep Child marriage Legal should tell you everything you need to know.
I mean don't you?
Darth Charles.
I mean fair
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also STREAM TONIGHT! LET'S MAKE COFFEE AND TALK ABOUT SHIT: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Wake up and start the day with some puppy eyebleach.
item.dc:creator: WakefulWark

item.title: I’m alone for the first time in 10 years tonight.
item.description:
One week ago I lost my partner and best friend after a year long fight with cancer. She died in our bed, in my arms. I’ve been telling people it was peaceful but it was horrible and I’ve never felt more helpless. Still, I wouldn’t trade being there with her for anything. The last of our family headed home a few hours ago and I’m now finally alone in this house and life we spent 10 years building together.
The day after we received MRI results showing it had spread to her brain we grabbed the dogs went to the coast. Two week later she was gone. I’ve been seeing a therapist and really fortunate to have great support but I still just feel so alone.
Thanks for reading, tell someone you love them and be kind to each other. #fuckcancer Edit: Made it through the night! Thanks everyone for the kind works and support. I love each of you!
item.dc:creator: noobasaurus

item.title: Thanks, Dick, for the L vs the Devil’s Lettuce
item.description:
And I guess, thanks need to go to Ronnie and Nancy too… WARNING: This website got me gonads deep in a 2 a.m. rabbit hole, DON’T click if you are just minding your own business and don’t really have a strong opinion about the legalization and decriminalization of certain plants and fungi: https://research.dom.edu/warondrugs/history The War on Drugs is an effort in the United States since the 1970s to combat illegal drug use by greatly increasing penalties, enforcement, and incarceration for drug offenders. The War on Drugs began in June 1971 when U.S. Pres. Richard Nixon declared drug abuse to be “public enemy number one” and increased federal funding for drug-control agencies and drug-treatment efforts. In 1973 the Drug Enforcement Administration was created out of the merger of the Office for Drug Abuse Law Enforcement, the Bureau of Narcotics and Dangerous Drugs, and the Office of Narcotics Intelligence to consolidate federal efforts to control drug abuse. The War on Drugs was a relatively small component of federal law-enforcement efforts until the presidency of Ronald Reagan, which began in 1981. Reagan greatly expanded the reach of the drug war and his focus on criminal punishment over treatment led to a massive increase in incarcerations for nonviolent drug offenses, from 50,000 in 1980 to 400,000 in 1997. In 1984 his wife, Nancy, spearheaded another facet of the War on Drugs with her “Just Say No” campaign, which was a privately funded effort to educate schoolchildren on the dangers of drug use. The expansion of the War on Drugs was in many ways driven by increased media coverage of—and resulting public nervousness over—the crack epidemic that arose in the early 1980s. This heightened concern over illicit drug use helped drive political support for Reagan’s hard-line stance on drugs. The U.S. Congress passed the Anti-Drug Abuse Act of 1986, which allocated $1.7 billion to the War on Drugs and established a series of “mandatory minimum” prison sentences for various drug offenses. A notable feature of mandatory minimums was the massive gap between the amounts of crack and of powder cocaine that resulted in the same minimum sentence: possession of five grams of crack led to an automatic five-year sentence while it took the possession of 500 grams of powder cocaine to trigger that sentence. Since approximately 80% of crack users were African American, mandatory minimums led to an unequal increase of incarceration rates for nonviolent Black drug offenders, as well as claims that the War on Drugs was a racist institution. Britannica, T. Editors of Encyclopaedia (2020). War on Drugs. Encyclopedia Britannica. https://www.britannica.com/topic/war-on-drugs
I had no idea this was happening (*gasps and clutches pearl necklace”
This needs to happen more.
item.dc:creator: WhatTheFruckRrobsterKraws

item.title: Dump Fourthst and the Furious
item.description:
But I want I really want to see is Bene Gesserit Yzma. And also live action Eartha Kitt. She’d kill it.
Still a fair question, even if toilet paper can now be reliably found at the store
I can’t do the gay voice without sounding like I’m faking it to the point of being offensive. And I am gay. Meh.
Yes. Yes we do.
It has come to my attention that I have not paid my taxes.
This Hobbes, my brother’s cat, back when he was a kitten. My brother and our mom took in a stray who turned out to be pregnant with five kittens. They promised they’d find homes for all of them. Turns out, those homes were all the same home; my mom’s place.
Here’s Hobbes helping me photograph a bowl I made for a customer.
So helpful.
item.dc:creator: MisterWeatherwax

item.title: Also, 3 different colleges.
item.description: Been a rough decade, moved around a lot following a guy I thought I'd marry (didn't pan out,) took classes here and there, but never hit the mark to graduate. It's bittersweet, for one I am so glad that I finally got the credits I needed (looking at you statistics) and on the other it feels like there's no reason to celebrate because I dicked around for over a decade. I can't even have the satisfaction of a good GPA due to my chronic procrastination and lack of motivation during so many semesters where I'd drop 2 classes, fail another and pass one with an A. I've been told my entire life that I'm bright and could do anything if only I would apply myself. ADHD is torture and I don't reccomend it. Anyway, I'm not where I wanted to be in life, I'm so far from it honestly, which just makes this feel all the more worthless. I know it's a step in the right direction, but even so, I can't help but feel like a complete and utter failure. MV edit : Thank you all so much, you wonderful people. I was sitting in bed, crying and feeling sorry for myself and your kind words really brought me out of that funk. Some of you have asked what I plan to do going forward, and the current heading is a paralegal course through the college's continuing education department this Fall. If anyone works in that field and has advice or could just tell me about the job, I'd appreciate it :)
item.dc:creator: nomorehate
